ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's datasheet */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., Active, Discontinued, Under Review) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the component record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the component record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electrical_characteristics" (
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electrical characteristic */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the characteristic belongs to */,
  "characteristic" TEXT /* Description of the characteristic */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the characteristic */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the characteristic */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the characteristic */,
  "nominal_value" TEXT /* Nominal or typical value of the characteristic */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance range for the characteristic */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the characteristic */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Test conditions under which the characteristic was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electrical_characteristics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "current_characteristics" (
  "current_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each current characteristic */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the characteristic belongs to */,
  "characteristic" TEXT /* Description of the characteristic */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the characteristic */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the characteristic */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the characteristic */,
  "nominal_value" TEXT /* Nominal or typical value of the characteristic */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance range for the characteristic */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the characteristic */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Test conditions under which the characteristic was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("current_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_current_characteristics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "output_characteristics" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output characteristic */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the characteristic belongs to */,
  "characteristic" TEXT /* Description of the characteristic */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the characteristic */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the characteristic */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the characteristic */,
  "nominal_value" TEXT /* Nominal or typical value of the characteristic */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance range for the characteristic */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the characteristic */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Test conditions under which the characteristic was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_output_characteristics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the role is assigned to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a component */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
